title: Friends and Foes Visual Honey Stages
description: Vanilla Tweaks Visual Honey Stages support for Friends and Foes Beehives
body:
# Overview

This resourcepack allows you to see the visual stages in the [Friends and Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) beehives of other wood types.

For the vanilla beehive, please download it from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) in the utilities section.

![Acacia Beehive in its honey stages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/alkfc3I1/images/bf766fe9c0a993b76d7ef93f73330e33427ef4f0.webp)

Check out similar projects here: https://modrinth.com/collection/N35iau5q

# Credits
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
- Friends and Foes: https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes
